verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est benedictio, qua benedixit Moyses, homo Dei, filiis Israël ante mortem suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְזֹ֣את הַבְּרָכָ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר בֵּרַ֥ךְ מֹשֶׁ֛ה אִ֥ישׁ הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים אֶת־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל לִפְנֵ֖י מוֹתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And this is the blessing, wherewith Moses the man of God blessed the children of Israel before his death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait :   Dominus de Sinai venit,  et de Seir ortus est nobis :  apparuit de monte Pharan,  et cum eo sanctorum millia.  In dextera ejus ignea lex.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמַ֗ר יְהֹוָ֞ה מִסִּינַ֥י בָּא֙ וְזָרַ֤ח מִשֵּׂעִיר֙ לָ֔מוֹ הוֹפִ֙יעַ֙ מֵהַ֣ר פָּארָ֔ן וְאָתָ֖ה מֵרִבְבֹ֣ת קֹ֑דֶשׁ מִימִינ֕וֹ (אשדת) [אֵ֥שׁ דָּ֖ת] לָֽמוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And he said, The Lord came from Sinai, and rose up from Seir unto them; he shined forth from mount Paran, and he came with ten thousands of saints: from his right hand went a fiery law for them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dilexit populos,  omnes sancti in manu illius sunt :  et qui appropinquant pedibus ejus,  accipient de doctrina illius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֚ף חֹבֵ֣ב עַמִּ֔ים כׇּל־קְדֹשָׁ֖יו בְּיָדֶ֑ךָ וְהֵם֙ תֻּכּ֣וּ לְרַגְלֶ֔ךָ יִשָּׂ֖א מִדַּבְּרֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Yea, he loved the people; all his saints are in thy hand: and they sat down at thy feet; every one shall receive of thy words.

verses.latin_vulgate: Legem præcepit nobis Moyses,  hæreditatem multitudinis Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּוֹרָ֥ה צִוָּה־לָ֖נוּ מֹשֶׁ֑ה מוֹרָשָׁ֖ה קְהִלַּ֥ת יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.king_james: Moses commanded us a law, even the inheritance of the congregation of Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erit apud rectissimum rex,  congregatis principibus populi cum tribubus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י בִישֻׁר֖וּן מֶ֑לֶךְ בְּהִתְאַסֵּף֙ רָ֣אשֵׁי עָ֔ם יַ֖חַד שִׁבְטֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: And he was king in Jeshurun, when the heads of the people and the tribes of Israel were gathered together.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vivat Ruben, et non moriatur,  et sit parvus in numero.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְחִ֥י רְאוּבֵ֖ן וְאַל־יָמֹ֑ת וִיהִ֥י מְתָ֖יו מִסְפָּֽר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Let Reuben live, and not die; and let not his men be few.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est Judæ benedictio :  Audi, Domine, vocem Judæ,  et ad populum suum introduc eum :  manus ejus pugnabunt pro eo,  et adjutor illius contra adversarios ejus erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְזֹ֣את לִיהוּדָה֮ וַיֹּאמַר֒ שְׁמַ֤ע יְהֹוָה֙ ק֣וֹל יְהוּדָ֔ה וְאֶל־עַמּ֖וֹ תְּבִיאֶ֑נּוּ יָדָיו֙ רָ֣ב ל֔וֹ וְעֵ֥זֶר מִצָּרָ֖יו תִּהְיֶֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And this is the blessing of Judah: and he said, Hear, Lord, the voice of Judah, and bring him unto his people: let his hands be sufficient for him; and be thou an help to him from his enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Levi quoque ait :  Perfectio tua, et doctrina tua viro sancto tuo,  quem probasti in tentatione,  et judicasti ad aquas contradictionis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְלֵוִ֣י אָמַ֔ר תֻּמֶּ֥יךָ וְאוּרֶ֖יךָ לְאִ֣ישׁ חֲסִידֶ֑ךָ אֲשֶׁ֤ר נִסִּיתוֹ֙ בְּמַסָּ֔ה תְּרִיבֵ֖הוּ עַל־מֵ֥י מְרִיבָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And of Levi he said, Let thy Thummim and thy Urim be with thy holy one, whom thou didst prove at Massah, and with whom thou didst strive at the waters of Meribah;

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui dixit patri suo et matri suæ : Nescio vos :  et fratribus suis : Ignoro vos :  et nescierunt filios suos.  Hi custodierunt eloquium tuum,  et pactum tuum servaverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָאֹמֵ֞ר לְאָבִ֤יו וּלְאִמּוֹ֙ לֹ֣א רְאִיתִ֔יו וְאֶת־אֶחָיו֙ לֹ֣א הִכִּ֔יר וְאֶת־בָּנָ֖ו לֹ֣א יָדָ֑ע כִּ֤י שָֽׁמְרוּ֙ אִמְרָתֶ֔ךָ וּבְרִיתְךָ֖ יִנְצֹֽרוּ׃
verses.king_james: Who said unto his father and to his mother, I have not seen him; neither did he acknowledge his brethren, nor knew his own children: for they have observed thy word, and kept thy covenant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Judicia tua, o Jacob,  et legem tuam, o Israël :  ponent thymiama in furore tuo,  et holocaustum super altare tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹר֤וּ מִשְׁפָּטֶ֙יךָ֙ לְיַֽעֲקֹ֔ב וְתוֹרָתְךָ֖ לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל יָשִׂ֤ימוּ קְטוֹרָה֙ בְּאַפֶּ֔ךָ וְכָלִ֖יל עַֽל־מִזְבְּחֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: They shall teach Jacob thy judgments, and Israel thy law: they shall put incense before thee, and whole burnt sacrifice upon thine altar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedic, Domine, fortitudini ejus :  et opera manuum illius suscipe.  Percute dorsa inimicorum ejus :  et qui oderunt eum, non consurgant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּרֵ֤ךְ יְהֹוָה֙ חֵיל֔וֹ וּפֹ֥עַל יָדָ֖יו תִּרְצֶ֑ה מְחַ֨ץ מׇתְנַ֧יִם קָמָ֛יו וּמְשַׂנְאָ֖יו מִן־יְקוּמֽוּן׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Bless, Lord, his substance, and accept the work of his hands: smite through the loins of them that rise against him, and of them that hate him, that they rise not again.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Benjamin ait :  Amantissimus Domini habitabit confidenter in eo :  quasi in thalamo tota die morabitur,  et inter humeros illius requiescet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְבִנְיָמִ֣ן אָמַ֔ר יְדִ֣יד יְהֹוָ֔ה יִשְׁכֹּ֥ן לָבֶ֖טַח עָלָ֑יו חֹפֵ֤ף עָלָיו֙ כׇּל־הַיּ֔וֹם וּבֵ֥ין כְּתֵפָ֖יו שָׁכֵֽן׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And of Benjamin he said, The beloved of the Lord shall dwell in safety by him; and the Lord shall cover him all the day long, and he shall dwell between his shoulders.

verses.latin_vulgate: Joseph quoque ait :  De benedictione Domini terra ejus,  de pomis cæli, et rore, atque abysso subjacente.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְיוֹסֵ֣ף אָמַ֔ר מְבֹרֶ֥כֶת יְהֹוָ֖ה אַרְצ֑וֹ מִמֶּ֤גֶד שָׁמַ֙יִם֙ מִטָּ֔ל וּמִתְּה֖וֹם רֹבֶ֥צֶת תָּֽחַת׃
verses.king_james: And of Joseph he said, Blessed of the Lord be his land, for the precious things of heaven, for the dew, and for the deep that coucheth beneath,

verses.latin_vulgate: De pomis fructuum solis ac lunæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִמֶּ֖גֶד תְּבוּאֹ֣ת שָׁ֑מֶשׁ וּמִמֶּ֖גֶד גֶּ֥רֶשׁ יְרָחִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And for the precious fruits brought forth by the sun, and for the precious things put forth by the moon,

verses.latin_vulgate: de vertice antiquorum montium,  de pomis collium æternorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֵרֹ֖אשׁ הַרְרֵי־קֶ֑דֶם וּמִמֶּ֖גֶד גִּבְע֥וֹת עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: And for the chief things of the ancient mountains, and for the precious things of the lasting hills,

verses.latin_vulgate: et de frugibus terræ, et de plenitudine ejus.  Benedictio illius qui apparuit in rubo,  veniat super caput Joseph,  et super verticem nazaræi inter fratres suos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִמֶּ֗גֶד אֶ֚רֶץ וּמְלֹאָ֔הּ וּרְצ֥וֹן שֹׁכְנִ֖י סְנֶ֑ה תָּב֙וֹאתָה֙ לְרֹ֣אשׁ יוֹסֵ֔ף וּלְקׇדְקֹ֖ד נְזִ֥יר אֶחָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: And for the precious things of the earth and fulness thereof, and for the good will of him that dwelt in the bush: let the blessing come upon the head of Joseph, and upon the top of the head of him that was separated from his brethren.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quasi primogeniti tauri pulchritudo ejus,  cornua rhinocerotis cornua illius :  in ipsis ventilabit gentes usque ad terminos terræ.  Hæ sunt multitudines Ephraim :  et hæc millia Manasse.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּכ֨וֹר שׁוֹר֜וֹ הָדָ֣ר ל֗וֹ וְקַרְנֵ֤י רְאֵם֙ קַרְנָ֔יו בָּהֶ֗ם עַמִּ֛ים יְנַגַּ֥ח יַחְדָּ֖ו אַפְסֵי־אָ֑רֶץ וְהֵם֙ רִבְב֣וֹת אֶפְרַ֔יִם וְהֵ֖ם אַלְפֵ֥י מְנַשֶּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: His glory is like the firstling of his bullock, and his horns are like the horns of unicorns: with them he shall push the people together to the ends of the earth: and they are the ten thousands of Ephraim, and they are the thousands of Manasseh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Zabulon ait :  Lætare, Zabulon, in exitu tuo,  et Issachar in tabernaculis tuis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִזְבוּלֻ֣ן אָמַ֔ר שְׂמַ֥ח זְבוּלֻ֖ן בְּצֵאתֶ֑ךָ וְיִשָּׂשכָ֖ר בְּאֹהָלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: And of Zebulun he said, Rejoice, Zebulun, in thy going out; and, Issachar, in thy tents.

verses.latin_vulgate: Populos vocabunt ad montem :  ibi immolabunt victimas justitiæ.  Qui inundationem maris quasi lac sugent,  et thesauros absconditos arenarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַמִּים֙ הַר־יִקְרָ֔אוּ שָׁ֖ם יִזְבְּח֣וּ זִבְחֵי־צֶ֑דֶק כִּ֣י שֶׁ֤פַע יַמִּים֙ יִינָ֔קוּ וּשְׂפֻנֵ֖י טְמ֥וּנֵי חֽוֹל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: They shall call the people unto the mountain; there they shall offer sacrifices of righteousness: for they shall suck of the abundance of the seas, and of treasures hid in the sand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Gad ait :  Benedictus in latitudine Gad :  quasi leo requievit,  cepitque brachium et verticem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְגָ֣ד אָמַ֔ר בָּר֖וּךְ מַרְחִ֣יב גָּ֑ד כְּלָבִ֣יא שָׁכֵ֔ן וְטָרַ֥ף זְר֖וֹעַ אַף־קׇדְקֹֽד׃
verses.king_james: And of Gad he said, Blessed be he that enlargeth Gad: he dwelleth as a lion, and teareth the arm with the crown of the head.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vidit principatum suum,  quod in parte sua doctor esset repositus :  qui fuit cum principibus populi,  et fecit justitias Domini,  et judicium suum cum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֤רְא רֵאשִׁית֙ ל֔וֹ כִּי־שָׁ֛ם חֶלְקַ֥ת מְחֹקֵ֖ק סָפ֑וּן וַיֵּתֵא֙ רָ֣אשֵׁי עָ֔ם צִדְקַ֤ת יְהֹוָה֙ עָשָׂ֔ה וּמִשְׁפָּטָ֖יו עִם־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And he provided the first part for himself, because there, in a portion of the lawgiver, was he seated; and he came with the heads of the people, he executed the justice of the Lord, and his judgments with Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dan quoque ait :  Dan catulus leonis, fluet largiter de Basan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְדָ֣ן אָמַ֔ר דָּ֖ן גּ֣וּר אַרְיֵ֑ה יְזַנֵּ֖ק מִן־הַבָּשָֽׁן׃
verses.king_james: And of Dan he said, Dan is a lion’s whelp: he shall leap from Bashan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Nephthali dixit :  Nephthali abundantia perfruetur,  et plenus erit benedictionibus Domini :  mare et meridiem possidebit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְנַפְתָּלִ֣י אָמַ֔ר נַפְתָּלִי֙ שְׂבַ֣ע רָצ֔וֹן וּמָלֵ֖א בִּרְכַּ֣ת יְהֹוָ֑ה יָ֥ם וְדָר֖וֹם יְרָֽשָׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And of Naphtali he said, O Naphtali, satisfied with favour, and full with the blessing of the Lord: possess thou the west and the south.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aser quoque ait :  Benedictus in filiis Aser,  sit placens fratribus suis,  et tingat in oleo pedem suum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְאָשֵׁ֣ר אָמַ֔ר בָּר֥וּךְ מִבָּנִ֖ים אָשֵׁ֑ר יְהִ֤י רְצוּי֙ אֶחָ֔יו וְטֹבֵ֥ל בַּשֶּׁ֖מֶן רַגְלֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And of Asher he said, Let Asher be blessed with children; let him be acceptable to his brethren, and let him dip his foot in oil.

verses.latin_vulgate: ferrum et æs calceamentum ejus.  Sicut dies juventutis tuæ, ita et senectus tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּרְזֶ֥ל וּנְחֹ֖שֶׁת מִנְעָלֶ֑ךָ וּכְיָמֶ֖יךָ דׇּבְאֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Thy shoes shall be iron and brass; and as thy days, so shall thy strength be.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non est deus alius ut Deus rectissimi,  ascensor cæli, auxiliator tuus.  Magnificentia ejus discurrunt nubes,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֥ין כָּאֵ֖ל יְשֻׁר֑וּן רֹכֵ֤ב שָׁמַ֙יִם֙ בְּעֶזְרֶ֔ךָ וּבְגַאֲוָת֖וֹ שְׁחָקִֽים׃
verses.king_james: There is none like unto the God of Jeshurun, who rideth upon the heaven in thy help, and in his excellency on the sky.

verses.latin_vulgate: habitaculum ejus sursum,  et subter brachia sempiterna  ejiciet a facie tua inimicum,  dicetque : Conterere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְעֹנָהֿ֙ אֱלֹ֣הֵי קֶ֔דֶם וּמִתַּ֖חַת זְרֹעֹ֣ת עוֹלָ֑ם וַיְגָ֧רֶשׁ מִפָּנֶ֛יךָ אוֹיֵ֖ב וַיֹּ֥אמֶר הַשְׁמֵֽד׃
verses.king_james: The eternal God is thy refuge, and underneath are the everlasting arms: and he shall thrust out the enemy from before thee; and shall say, Destroy them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habitabit Israël confidenter, et solus.  Oculus Jacob in terra frumenti et vini,  cælique caligabunt rore.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכֹּן֩ יִשְׂרָאֵ֨ל בֶּ֤טַח בָּדָד֙ עֵ֣ין יַֽעֲקֹ֔ב אֶל־אֶ֖רֶץ דָּגָ֣ן וְתִיר֑וֹשׁ אַף־שָׁמָ֖יו יַ֥עַרְפוּ טָֽל׃
verses.king_james: Israel then shall dwell in safety alone: the fountain of Jacob shall be upon a land of corn and wine; also his heavens shall drop down dew.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus es tu, Israël :  quis similis tui, popule, qui salvaris in Domino ?  Scutum auxilii tui,  et gladius gloriæ tuæ :  negabunt te inimici tui,  et tu eorum colla calcabis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁרֶ֨יךָ יִשְׂרָאֵ֜ל מִ֣י כָמ֗וֹךָ עַ֚ם נוֹשַׁ֣ע בַּֽיהֹוָ֔ה מָגֵ֣ן עֶזְרֶ֔ךָ וַאֲשֶׁר־חֶ֖רֶב גַּאֲוָתֶ֑ךָ וְיִכָּחֲשׁ֤וּ אֹיְבֶ֙יךָ֙ לָ֔ךְ וְאַתָּ֖ה עַל־בָּמוֹתֵ֥ימוֹ תִדְרֹֽךְ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Happy art thou, O Israel: who is like unto thee, O people saved by the Lord, the shield of thy help, and who is the sword of thy excellency! and thine enemies shall be found liars unto thee; and thou shalt tread upon their high places.
